canonical_query: Why was I charged twice for my subscription this month?
response_text: It looks like a duplicate charge may have occurred. We'll review your billing history and refund any duplicate payment within 5 to 7 business days.

canonical_query: How do I update the credit card used for billing?
response_text: You can update your payment method under Settings > Billing > Payment Methods, where you can add or replace your card.

canonical_query: How do I request a refund for my recent order?
response_text: We're sorry to hear that. Open Orders, select the order, and choose Request Refund. We'll process it within 5 to 7 business days.

canonical_query: What is your refund policy for digital downloads?
response_text: Digital products can be refunded within 14 days of purchase if they have not been substantially downloaded or used.

canonical_query: I cannot log into my account, what should I do?
response_text: Please try resetting your password with the Forgot Password link. If you still cannot log in, clear your browser cache or contact us to unlock the account.

canonical_query: How do I reset my forgotten password?
response_text: Click Forgot Password on the login page, enter your email, and follow the secure reset link we send you.

canonical_query: The mobile app keeps crashing on startup, how do I fix it?
response_text: Please update to the latest version, restart your device, and reinstall the app if crashes continue. Sharing the error log helps us diagnose faster.

canonical_query: My dashboard is not loading any data.
response_text: Try refreshing the page and clearing the cache. If the dashboard is still blank, check your network connection and any active filters that might hide your data.

canonical_query: How much does the Pro plan cost each month?
response_text: The Pro plan is $29 per user per month billed monthly, or $290 per user per year when billed annually.

canonical_query: What is the difference between the Basic and Pro plans?
response_text: Basic covers core features for small teams, while Pro adds advanced analytics, integrations, and priority support.

canonical_query: How do I get started after I sign up?
response_text: Welcome aboard! Start by completing your profile, inviting teammates, and following the in-app setup checklist to configure your workspace.

canonical_query: How do I invite my teammates to the workspace?
response_text: Open Settings > Members > Invite, enter their email addresses, and assign roles. They will receive an invite link by email.
